summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Unovia Consulting website with new features. Backend APIs working perfectly (13/13 tests passed). Frontend functionality mostly working with minor UI interaction issues.

ui_bugs.issue: Service interest dropdown has interaction issues with Playwright automation - element stability problems
ui_bugs.workaround: Form works with alternative selection method, backend API accepts submissions correctly

passed_tests: Admin dashboard UI and stats display
All website sections (Hero, About, Services, Team, Insights, Contact)
Blog posts display in insights section
